app.name: Fameworld
app.footer: Fameworld — a living world of music and fame. All content is original.

skills.noMasters: No masters to learn from here right now.
skills.masterHint: Learning from a master is faster than studying alone.

auth.toLogin: Already have an account? Log in

create.title: Create your character
create.intro: Choose who you are and where your story begins.
create.noCities: No cities available yet. Seed the world first.

home.hospitalNotice: Your character is recovering in hospital and cannot act until mood and health rise above 15%.
home.recentPlacesFlavor: The last five places you have been. Only you can see this list.
home.recentPlacesEmpty: You have not been anywhere yet. The city awaits.

city.title: {city}
city.welcomeFlavor: These pages tell you what is happening in town, where to go and who runs the place.
city.visitingNote: You are reading about a city you are not currently in.
city.mayorSilent: The mayor has not addressed the public yet.
city.noMayor: This city currently has no mayor. The seat awaits someone ambitious.
city.noArticles: The press has been quiet about this town lately.
city.lotteryFlavor: Five numbers, drawn every game week. A ticket costs {price} M$; match 3, 4 or 5 to win.
city.noConcerts: No concerts lately. Someone should fix that.
city.pickCityFlavor: Read up on any city in the world before you pack your bags.

locale.studyHint: Buy a book once, then study it from Attributes & Skills to raise the skill over time.
locale.renting: You are renting an apartment here. Rent is charged weekly.
locale.defaultManagerNote: The management has nothing to add. The door is open; behave yourself.
locale.otherCityNote: This place is in {city} — you can look, but you would have to travel to act.
locale.flightsFlavor: A one-way ticket costs {cost} M$ and the trip will take a bite of your energy.
locale.d_CLUB: Small stage, loud amps. Clubs are where reputations are made one sweaty night at a time.
locale.d_RECORD_LABEL: Where contracts get signed and careers change hands.
locale.d_UNIVERSITY: Lecture halls and long corridors. Knowledge for a fee, wisdom on your own time.
locale.d_HOSPITAL: Not the cheeriest address in town, but it will put you back together.
locale.d_SHOP: Shelves of things you suddenly need.
locale.d_BAR: Dim lights, honest prices, questionable decisions.
locale.d_RESTAURANT: A proper meal beats pocket snacks every time.
locale.d_APARTMENT: Four walls to call your own — for a weekly price.
locale.d_STADIUM: The big stage. Fill it and you have arrived.
locale.d_RADIO: One song here reaches more ears than a hundred flyers.
locale.d_PARK: Green, free and open. The cheapest therapy in town.
locale.d_CITY_HALL: Where local politicians run the city. Decisions echo far beyond these halls.
locale.d_COURTHOUSE: Justice is served here — punctuality strongly recommended.
locale.d_PRISON: Thick walls, thin patience. Best viewed from the outside.
locale.d_TEMPLE: A quiet place for loud minds.
locale.d_AIRPORT: The gateway to everywhere else. Keep your ticket and your temper.
locale.d_HIGHWAY: The road out of town, for those with wheels and a reason.
locale.d_HOTEL: Clean sheets and room service: sleep like someone who made it.
locale.d_LOST_AND_FOUND: Whatever the city swallows tends to surface here.
locale.d_BANK: Your money, behind thicker doors than your own.
locale.d_STUDIO: Where songs stop being ideas and start being records.

study.noBooks: No books yet. Buy one at a shop.
study.noSkills: No skills yet. Buy a book at a shop and study it.

career.title: Career
career.noJob: You have no job yet. Visit a venue in the city and apply. Salaries are paid weekly on in-game Fridays.
career.paydayNote: Salaries are paid automatically each in-game Friday.

band.startIntro: Form a band, compose songs, rehearse them and play concerts to build fame.
band.noSongs: No songs yet. Compose your first one.
band.cannotPlay: You need at least one song and a venue in your city (and to be out of hospital) to play.
band.stageRolesHint: Your primary role counts 80% and secondary 20% toward concert performance.
band.recordHint: Pick tracks and a format. Sales, chart score and royalties accrue weekly.

charts.note: Charts rank active releases by recent momentum. Record a release to enter.

relationships.heirNote: When your character dies, you continue as your eldest living child (your heir).
relationships.noRelations: No relationships yet. Meet people around the city.

messages.noRecipients: No one to message yet. Meet people first.

estate.vipInfo: Learn skills faster and get a VIP badge.

politics.taxHint: Tax is applied to business profit in your city.
politics.noCandidates: No candidates yet. Be the first to run.
politics.youAreCandidate: You are running in this election.

press.interviewHint: Raises your star value and your band's fame. One interview per game week; Media Manipulation skill and a PR agent improve the outcome.
press.interviewCooldown: The press has heard enough for now — come back next week.
press.prAgentHint: Costs {fee} $ per game week. Places your interviews better and kills most gossip stories before they print.
press.fanClubHint: Founding costs {fee} $. Members grow every week with your fame and swell your concert audiences.
press.needBand: You need a band before fans can organise.
press.leaderOnly: Only the band leader can found the fan club.
press.emptyNews: No stories yet. Give an interview to make headlines.

awards.empty: No award show has been held yet. The first gala closes out the game year.
awards.achHint: Trophies are granted automatically as you play.

flash.none: Nothing new to show right now.
flash.walkedTo: What a stroll! You walked over to {name}.
flash.rested: You took a breather and feel rested.
flash.ate: That hit the spot. You had a proper meal.
flash.dpAttributeSpent: Good session. The training is paying off.
flash.focusSet: Your focus is set. Now live accordingly.
flash.attitudeSet: Noted. The world will meet the new you.
flash.deposited: {amount} M$ is now safe in the bank.
flash.workedOut: Good session at the gym. The body will thank you later.
flash.prayed: A quiet moment, and the noise inside settles.
flash.hotelRested: A proper night in a proper bed. You feel brand new.
flash.ticketBought: Ticket in hand. Now the waiting game.
flash.mayorNoteSaved: Your message is on the city page.

guide.title: Welcome to the Fameworld Guide
guide.intro: Everything you need to find your footing in this world: pick a topic below. The guide grows together with the game.
guide.topic_start_sub: your first days, meters and money
guide.topic_music_sub: bands, songs, rehearsals, concerts and records
guide.topic_health_sub: mood, health, energy and the hospital

shop.title: Welcome to the Shop
shop.intro: Extras that support the game live here. Everything you need to play is earned in the world itself.
shop.vipPitch: VIP supports the world and unlocks a set of comforts for 30 real days.
shop.vipPerk1: Faster learning on all timed study.
shop.vipPerk2: A VIP badge next to your name.
shop.vipPerk3: More VIP perks arrive as the game grows.
shop.vipActive: Your VIP membership is active until {date}.
shop.creditsSoon: Credit products (treats, helpers and extra content) are on the way.

diary.title: Dear Diary...
diary.flavor: The diary writes itself: notable moments of your life end up here automatically.
diary.empty: Nothing worth writing home about yet. Go live a little.
diary.e_composed: A new tune came to me today. I am calling it "{title}".
diary.e_concert: We played {venue} tonight — {attendance} people showed up and the reviews landed at {review}/100.
diary.e_recorded: We were in the studio today. "{title}" is recorded and ready to meet the world.
diary.e_interviewed: Talked to the press today. Let us hope they quote me right.
diary.e_flew: I caught a flight to {city} today. New city, same old me.

develop.title: Develop Your Character
develop.flavor: Everyone who keeps living earns development points on Sundays. Spend them wisely.
develop.attrFlavor: A training session costs {cost} DP and pushes the attribute forward.
develop.skillFlavor: Spending {cost} DP raises a skill by one full star (prerequisites still apply).

focus.title: Character Focus
focus.flavor: What you do with your spare hours and where you point your career shape who you become.
focus.freeTimeFlavor: A pastime colours your days and your diary.
focus.careerFlavor: Your professional compass. Where the ambition points, the effort follows.

personality.title: Personality & Behaviour
personality.flavor: How you carry yourself in public follows you into every room.
personality.attitudeFlavor: Pick the face you show the world.
personality.at_flirty_sub: a wink goes a long way
personality.laterFlavor: Touring behaviour, hotel preferences and your policy toward admirers open up with the artist phases.

bodyHealth.title: Body and Health
bodyHealth.flavor: Keep an eye on yourself. Neglect the body and sooner or later the hospital does the caring for you.
bodyHealth.attrFlavor: Attributes describe what a person is made of. They grow slowly, through work, training and living.
bodyHealth.moodFlavor: How content a soul is. Happiness is not mandatory, but life is kinder to the cheerful.
bodyHealth.healthFlavor: How well the body holds together. Most of what you want to do goes better when healthy.
bodyHealth.illnessesEmpty: As far as anyone can tell, {name} has no illness or special condition.
bodyHealth.illnessesFlavor: Plenty of ailments roam this world. Some are curable; some you learn to live with.
bodyHealth.addictionsFlavor: Overdo anything long enough and it starts owning you. Quitting is possible — in time.
bodyHealth.surgeriesEmpty: {name} has never been on the operating table.
bodyHealth.surgeriesFlavor: Some operations are necessary, others purely cosmetic. Both kinds are listed here.
bodyHealth.tattoosFlavor: A tattoo says something without a word being spoken. Clothing may hide it, of course.
bodyHealth.immunitiesEmpty: No immunities or vaccinations on record.
bodyHealth.immunitiesFlavor: What your body has learned to fight off during your time in this world is listed here.

economy.title: Economy
economy.flavor: A soul does not strictly need money — but its presence is remarkably convenient.
economy.cashLine: {name} is carrying <amount></amount> in cash right now.
economy.billsFlavor: Pay your bills on time. Fall behind and it goes on your record — and eventually on the street.
economy.noBills: No bills on file. Living light has its perks.
economy.bankFlavor: Money in the bank is an investment: it earns {rate}% weekly interest (capped at {cap} M$). Loans arrive later.
economy.noAccount: No bank account on record. A first deposit opens one.

family.title: {name}'s family tree
family.flavor: Blood remembers. Your closest family is listed here; the full tree grows as the generations do.
family.empty: {name} has no known family. Every dynasty starts somewhere.
family.heirNote: When your story ends, your eldest living child carries the family name — and your account — onward.

bio.title: Background and Other Information
bio.flavor: The dry facts of a life, plus whatever story you choose to tell about yourself.
bio.bioFlavor: Written by you, read by everyone. Make it count.
bio.bioPlaceholder: Tell the world who you are...

player.title: Player Information
player.flavor: The person behind the character — account facts only the owner sees in full.

items.title: Clothes and Items
items.flavor: Everything you carry through this world. Clothes, instruments and trinkets join the list in later chapters.
items.empty: {name} travels light — nothing in the bags yet.
items.studyHint: Books can be studied on the <link>Body & Health</link> page.
items.loadFlavor: Carry too much and your back will file a complaint. Weight rules arrive with the item system.

housing.title: Housing
housing.flavor: Everyone needs a door to close behind them at night.
housing.homeless: {name} has no place to call home right now.
housing.estateLink: Browse homes on the Estate page.
housing.owns: Owns {name} in {city}. No rent, no landlord, no worries.
housing.rents: Renting at {name} for {rent} M$ a week.
housing.keysFlavor: Door codes and guest access arrive together with the housing system's next chapter.

skeleton.comingSoon: This page comes alive in an upcoming chapter of the world.
skeleton.blog_flavor: Your public writings, read by fans and rivals alike.
skeleton.invitations_flavor: Invitations to bands, parties and ventures gather here.
skeleton.flights_flavor: Booked trips between cities are listed here.
skeleton.events_flavor: Upcoming and past events you are part of.
skeleton.tasks_flavor: Odd jobs and quests that pay in more than money.
skeleton.activities_flavor: Timed pastimes at the places of the city — the gym, the temple, the park.
skeleton.vehicles_flavor: Your rides, from rusty vans to tour buses.
skeleton.shares_flavor: Your stakes in the businesses of this world.
skeleton.shopping_flavor: Search every store in the world from one page.
skeleton.shopping_empty: The assistant opens with the store system.
skeleton.gifts_flavor: Items offered to you and offers you have made.

venues.title: Places in {city}
venues.flavor: Search the town by name or type, then walk over.
venues.name: Name
venues.noResults: Nothing matches. Try a looser search.
